file.content:
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: spark-pi
  namespace: spark-pi
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-pi
        component: driver
    spec:
      # PLANTED FAULT 2 (Law 5): this ServiceAccount does not exist — pod
      # creation fails until the agent changes it to "spark-pi".
      serviceAccountName: spark-nonexistent
      containers:
      - name: spark-submit
        # PLANTED FAULT 1 (Law 5): the "-nonexistent" image suffix does not
        # exist — ImagePullBackOff until the agent strips it.
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3-nonexistent
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          echo "=============================================="
          echo "  SparkPi Job"
          echo "=============================================="
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
            --master local[2] \
            --driver-memory 512m \
            --class org.apache.spark.examples.SparkPi \
            /opt/spark/examples/jars/spark-examples_2.12-3.5.3.jar \
            1000
          EXIT_CODE=$?
          echo "SparkPi job finished with exit code: $EXIT_CODE"
          exit $EXIT_CODE
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            # PLANTED FAULT 3 (Law 5): "512" is a LEGAL quantity but means 512
            # BYTES, not 512Mi — a wrong-unit request the agent must fix to
            # "512Mi" (the oracle rejects a suffix-less quantity).
            memory: "512"
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 1Gi
      restartPolicy: Never

content.thinking:
Now I have a clear picture of the issues:
1. Wrong image: `apache/spark:3.5.3-nonexistent` → should be `apache/spark:3.5.3`
2. Wrong serviceAccountName: `spark-nonexistent` → should be `spark-pi`
3. Wrong memory format: `"512"` → should be `"512Mi"`
4. Missing RBAC permission: `pods` resource missing from Role

Let me fix all of these:
1. Edit the YAML file to fix all three issues
2. Fix the RBAC role to add "pods"
3. Delete the failing job and re-apply it with the corrected configuration

I should verify what service accounts are available and confirm the correct image version matches what's running on the master and worker nodes.

content.text: Now I have a full picture. Let me fix all four issues simultaneously.
Good, `spark-pi` service account exists. Now let me apply all fixes:

content.text: Now fix the RBAC role to add `pods`, then delete the failing job and re-apply:
Now I'll poll until the job completes:

input.command:
for i in $(seq 1 60); do
  STATUS=$(kubectl get job spark-pi -n spark-pi -o jsonpath='{.status.conditions[*].type}' 2>/dev/null)
  PODS=$(kubectl get pods -n spark-pi -l app=spark-pi --no-headers 2>/dev/null | tail -1)
  echo "[$i] Job conditions: '$STATUS' | Pod: $PODS"
  if echo "$STATUS" | grep -q "Complete"; then
    echo "Job completed successfully!"
    break
  fi
  if echo "$STATUS" | grep -q "Failed"; then
    echo "Job failed!"
    kubectl get events -n spark-pi --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' 2>/dev/null | tail -10
    break
  fi
  sleep 5
done
input.description: Poll job status until complete or failed

description: Poll job status until complete or failed
